# Files that constitute the fork's "drift surface" against upstream/main.
# Constitution Principle XI rule 6 — drift watcher.
# The drift-check script computes git diff --stat for these paths and fails
# any PR that grows the cumulative diff > BASELINE + 50 lines unless the
# commit message starts with `drift:`.

# The 6 plugins extended in-place by enterprise (sibling files only)
plugins/governance/
plugins/logging/
plugins/telemetry/
plugins/otel/
plugins/semanticcache/
plugins/prompts/

# Single hook anchors on upstream files
transports/bifrost-http/lib/middleware.go
transports/config.schema.json
ui/src/routes.tsx

# Top-level files that diverge by necessity
AGENTS.md
CLAUDE.md
README.md
Makefile
go.work

# Helm values (overlay pattern: enterprise lives in values-enterprise.yaml)
helm-charts/bifrost/values.yaml

# PR template — single Constitution checklist append
.github/pull_request_template.md
